calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maurice Mosley, 206-399-7152 for Defendant in Pro Per

No other appearances

Discussion held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MAURICE MOSLEY'S Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Defendant Maurice Mosly's motion to vacate judgment is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled in accordance with the time requirements of Code of Civil Procedure 1005(b).

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAURICE MOSLEY'S, AN INDIVIDUAL, Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Appearances (in court):
Maurice Mosley, in propria persona, Defendant.

Not argued/contested. The court advises Mr. Mosley of the court's procedures regarding properly contesting the court's tentative ruling, which he has failed to do. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. Moving party has not provided a proof of service of the moving papers on the judgment creditor. See Code Civ. Proc., section 1005, subdivision (b).

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
